name: agent-dispatch
description: Portable agent task-queue + per-host coordinator. A single-writer, WAL-mode SQLite leased work queue with a six-state model (proposed/queued/claimed/started/completed/abandoned), capability-gated atomic claim, affinity routing, and lease recovery -- so full-auto agents coordinate without origin/master push latency or a dedicated account per agent. Tasks are graduated context-handoffs (prompt + Markdown payload).
